description: Implement all AI-powered services for QuantDrive: ai-organize.service.ts (auto-sort uploads into folders by AI classification), ai-duplicate.service.ts (pHash-based duplicate detection), ai-search-content.service.ts (OCR + full-text content search), ai-summarize-file.service.ts (file preview/summary without opening), ai-extract-data.service.ts (receipt/invoice to structured data extraction). Also implement the route files: files.ts, folders.ts, sharing.ts, ai.ts.
steps: Create apps/quantdrive/backend/services/ai-organize.service.ts - AIOrganizeService class with AIEngine DI. Method: categorizeFile(filename, mimeType, content, userId) returns suggested folder path. Uses AI to classify files into categories (Documents, Images, Videos, Music, Archives, Receipts, Code, etc.). Method: autoOrganize(fileId, userId) moves file to suggested folder.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/services/ai-duplicate.service.ts - AIDuplicateService class. Method: computeHash(content: Buffer) returns a perceptual hash string. Method: findDuplicates(userId) scans user's files and returns groups of similar files (similarity > 0.9). Method: compareTwoFiles(fileIdA, fileIdB) returns similarity score 0-1. Uses chunked comparison for large files.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/services/ai-search-content.service.ts - AISearchContentService class with AIEngine DI. Method: indexFile(fileId, content, mimeType, userId) extracts text (OCR simulation for images, text extraction for docs). Method: searchContent(query, userId) searches across indexed file content. Returns matched files with relevance scores and snippets.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/services/ai-summarize-file.service.ts - AISummarizeFileService class with AIEngine DI. Method: summarizeFile(fileId, content, mimeType, userId) returns a brief summary, key points, and file type-specific metadata. Handles different file types: text docs, spreadsheets, images (description), code files.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/services/ai-extract-data.service.ts - AIExtractDataService class with AIEngine DI. Method: extractFromReceipt(content, userId) returns structured data: {vendor, date, total, currency, items[], taxAmount}. Method: extractFromInvoice(content, userId) returns {invoiceNumber, vendor, dueDate, lineItems[], total, currency}.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/routes/files.ts - Fastify plugin with routes: POST /files (upload with encryption), GET /files/:id (download with decryption), GET /files/:id/metadata, PUT /files/:id, DELETE /files/:id. Zod validation for all inputs. Auth required.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/routes/folders.ts - Fastify plugin with routes: POST /folders, GET /folders, GET /folders/:id, PUT /folders/:id, DELETE /folders/:id, GET /folders/:id/contents. Auth required.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/routes/sharing.ts - Fastify plugin with routes: POST /shares (share file/folder), GET /shares (list shares), DELETE /shares/:id (revoke), POST /shares/:id/accept. Auth required.

Create apps/quantdrive/backend/routes/ai.ts - Fastify plugin with routes: POST /ai/organize/:fileId, POST /ai/duplicates (find duplicates), POST /ai/search (content search), POST /ai/summarize/:fileId, POST /ai/extract/:fileId. Auth required.
acceptance_criteria: AIOrganizeService categorizes test files into correct folders (e.g., .pdf to Documents, .jpg to Images, receipt.pdf to Receipts)
AIDuplicateService detects files with identical/similar content
AISearchContentService indexes and searches file content with relevant results
AISummarizeFileService produces meaningful summaries for different file types
All route files compile and register correctly with Fastify
All routes have proper zod validation and auth checks
verification: Run `NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run` from apps/quantdrive directory and confirm all tests pass
Run `npx tsc --noEmit -p apps/quantdrive/tsconfig.backend.json` from repo root to verify TypeScript compiles
